description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a warm, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front features two sliding doors: one door is solid wood, while the other incorporates a large, vertically-oriented mirror panel. Both doors have slim, recessed handles for easy sliding. The wardrobe stands on a short, sturdy base and has a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the consistent wood grain pattern, and the overall construction appears robust and functional, suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces.
description: A tall, wooden wardrobe with sliding doors, one featuring a large mirror and the other solid wood, both with recessed handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors, one with a large mirror panel and the other solid wood, both with recessed handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain surface and the slim profile of the wardrobe.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, uninterrupted wood grain panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the plain wood grain and slim profile.
